name.en-US: ELT-2 Elsys LoRaWAN Multipurpose Sensor
name.pt-BR: ELT-2 Sensor Multiuso LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ELT-2 — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity and light. It also exposes external probe inputs (analog, digital, temperature, distance). Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
